CustomField.formula: IF( OR( AND(TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c) = "Aircraft MR", leaseworks__Bank_Account__c <> leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lessor_Bnk_For_MR__c), AND(TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c) = "Security Deposit", leaseworks__Bank_Account__c <> leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lessor_Bnk_For_SD__c), AND(TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c) = "Other", leaseworks__Bank_Account__c <> leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Bank_Account_For_Others__c), AND(TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c) = "Fixed Rent", leaseworks__Bank_Account__c <> leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lesor_Bank_for_Rent__c), AND(TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c) = "Floating Rent", leaseworks__Bank_Account__c <> leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lesor_Bank_for_Rent__c), AND(TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c) = "Manual Rent", leaseworks__Bank_Account__c <> leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lesor_Bank_for_Rent__c), AND(TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c) = "Power By The Hour", leaseworks__Bank_Account__c <> leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lesor_Bank_for_Rent__c), AND(TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Category__c) = "MR", leaseworks__Bank_Account__c <> leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lessor_Bnk_For_MR__c) ), true, false )
CustomField.label: Mismatched Bank Account?
